title: Emberlight
wikitext:
{{Infobox Item |name = Emberlight |image = [[File:Emberlight.png]] |release = [[10 July]] [[2024]] |update = While Guthix Sleeps |members = Yes |quest = No |tradeable = No |placeholder = Yes |equipable = Yes |stackable = No |noteable = No |options = Wield, Revert, Drop |examine = Silver, blood and crystal smelted in tormenting flames. |value = 800000 |weight = 0.907 |id = 29589 |leagueRegion = Misthalin }} [[File:Emberlight detail.png|left|150px]] '''Emberlight''' is a [[demonbane weapon]] requiring level 77 [[Attack]] to wield. It is made by using a [[tormented synapse]] on an [[anvil]] with an [[Arclight]] (must be fully charged, [[Arclight#Infusion|infused]], or a combination of the two) and a [[hammer]] in the inventory. This requires level 74 [[Smithing]] (boostable) and having read [[Duradel's notes]] after completion of [[While Guthix Sleeps]]. Arclight infusion and charges can be combined to reach the requirement for upgrading, with each percent of infusion being worth 100 charges (for example: 7,000 charges and 30% infusion). Emberlight retains the same [[Arclight#Passive_effect|characteristics]] as Arclight (70% increased accuracy and damage against [[Demon (attribute)|demons]]), but its primary advantages are that it no longer degrades, has higher combat stats, and has a stronger [[special attack]] against demons. [[Duke Sucellus]] is a lone exception to this passive effect, as he possesses 30% resistance to demonbane, which gives Emberlight a 49% accuracy and damage increase compared to the normal 70%. Due to how max hits are calculated this would be comparable with having a weapon with a strength bonus 66 without any gear and up to 199 in maxed gear when fighting demons. A [[player killer]] will receive the synapse from their opponent if it is not one of the protected items. ==Combat stats== {{Infobox Bonuses |astab = +63 |aslash = +70 |acrush = 0 |amagic = 0 |arange = 0 |dstab = 0 |dslash = 3 |dcrush = 2 |dmagic = 5 |drange = 0 |str = +13 |rstr = 0 |mdmg = 0 |prayer = 0 |slot = weapon |speed = 4 |attackrange = 1 |combatstyle = Slash Sword |image = [[File:Emberlight equipped male.png|190px]] |altimage = [[File:Emberlight equipped female.png|190px]] }} {{CombatStyles|Slash Sword|speed=4|attackrange=1}} ==Creation== A tormented synapse can be used on an anvil with a hammer and Arclight (must be fully charged, [[Arclight#Infusion|infused]], or a combination of the two) in the inventory to make an Emberlight. This requires level 74 Smithing. The player must also have read [[Duradel's notes]] beforehand. Without an anvil, a message will appear stating "You try to attach the synapse to the sword. The blade sizzles for a moment, but the synapse just slides off it again". Below the required level, a message will appear stating ''"You attempt to attach the synapse to the sword, but burn yourself in the process. You'll need a Smithing level of 74 to craft Emberlight".'' This will deal 4 damage to the player, but cannot kill them; attempting to make Emberlight without the Smithing level and having less than 6 hitpoints will prompt the character to state ''"I'm not sure I want to try that when I'm this injured".'' The first Emberlight created on an account grants 730 Smithing experience, whilst subsequent ones grant 73 experience. ===First time=== {{Recipe |skill1 = Smithing |skill1lvl = 74 |skill1boostable = Yes |skill1exp = 730 |notes = Have read {{plink|Duradel's notes}} |ticks = 5 |members = Yes |tools = Hammer |facilities = Anvil |mat1 = Tormented synapse |mat2 = Arclight |mat2itemnote = Needs to be either fully charged (10,000 charges) or [[Arclight#Infusion|infused]], or a combination thereof. |output1 = Emberlight |output1subtxt = Emberlight (first time) }} ===Revert & Recreation=== The process to create Emberlight can be reversed, returning only the tormented synapse as a result. Any newly created [[Darklight]] or [[Arclight]] will have no infusion. When upgrading Darklight to Arclight after reverting Emberlight, Arclight will only have 1000 charges. If a player wishes to revert Emberlight to create a different weapon with the [[Tormented synapse]], the total cost of recreating Emberlight will be 30 [[ancient shard]]s and 1,000 coins; reclaim [[Darklight]] from [[Sir Prysin]] for 1,000 coins, 3 [[ancient shard]]s to convert Darklight into [[Arclight]] (which will have 1000 charges), an additional 27 [[Ancient shards]] to fully charge Arclight, and a [[Tormented synapse]]. Subsequent creations of Emberlight reward reduced experience. ===Subsequent times=== {{Recipe |skill1 = Smithing |skill1lvl = 74 |skill1boostable = Yes |skill1exp = 73 |notes = Have read {{plink|Duradel's notes}} |ticks = 5 |members = Yes |tools = Hammer |facilities = Anvil |mat1 = Tormented synapse |mat2 = Arclight |mat2itemnote = Needs to be either fully charged (10,000 charges) or [[Arclight#Infusion|infused]], or a combination thereof. |output1 = Emberlight |output1subtxt = Emberlight (subsequent times) }} [[Arclight]] charges and infusion are tracked per sword. A player can posses multiple Arclight via the [[drop trick]] method when claiming a [[Darklight]] from [[Sir Prysin]]. If a player wishes to swap their synapse between weapons or trade it between players often, it is possible to have multiple separate Arclight banked and at maximum charges; though preparing such a situation would normally be a much greater effort than obtaining a spare synapse to keep a completed Emberlight. ==Special attack== [[File:Weaken (Emberlight).gif|thumb|250px|A player performing Emberlight's special attack, ''Weaken''.]] Emberlight's [[special attack]] uses a version of ''Weaken'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy and lowers the opponent's [[Strength]], [[Attack]], and [[Defence]] levels by 5% (15% for [[Demon (attribute)|demons]]) of their base level + 1.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/948619653617717248|date=3 January 2018|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/107311|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[It seems like the Darklight special attack actually drains by 5%/10% + 1. Is that true or just an inconsistency I'm seeing?] It's got a +1 in there, yes. Possibly to ensure it always does something, even if a stat is already low.}} This is a +5% improvement to Arclight and Darklight's 10% drain on demons but is otherwise the same. The accuracy roll for ''Weaken'' is made against an opponent's stab defence,{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/793083437976543233|date=31 October 2016|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/109639|archivedate=24 December 2022|quote=[Against what defensive style bonus does the special attack of the darklight/arclight roll against? The dds always uses slash.] Stab.}} and its drain effect only applies to [[successful hit]]s. ''Weaken'' will stack additively upon [[successful hit]]s unlike the [[dragon warhammer]], which stacks multiplicatively. Two successful special attacks thus reduce an opponent's Strength, Attack and Defence by 10% + 2, or 30% + 2 against demonic targets. ==Sound effects== {{SFXTableHead}} {{SFXLine|file=Equip fun.wav|desc=Wielding}} {{SFXLine|file=Hacksword attack (slash).wav|desc=Attacking with slash}} {{SFXLine|file=Hacksword attack (stab).wav|desc=Attacking with stab}} {{SFXLine|file=Emberlight special attack 1.wav|desc=Special attack part 1}} {{SFXLine|file=Emberlight special attack 2.wav|desc=Special attack part 2}} {{SFXLine|file=Emberlight special attack 3.wav|desc=Special attack part 3}} {{SFXTableBottom}} ==Used in recommended equipment== {{Used in recommended equipment|Emberlight}} ==Treasure Trails== {{EmoteClueHeader}} {{EmoteClue|tier=master|emote=Slap Head|location=Centre of the [[Catacombs of Kourend]]|item1=Emberlight|cost=0|item2=amulet of the damned|cost2={{GEP|Amulet of the damned (full)}}|variation=Arclight}} {{EmoteClueBottom}} ==Transcript== {{Hastranscript|item}} ==Gallery== Tormented demon weapon concept art.png|Concept arts for the weapons created from items dropped by tormented demons, by [[Mod Grub]]. Weaken (Emberlight) model.gif|Emberlight's Weaken animation, by [[Mod Hend]]. ==Changes== {{Subject changes header}} {{Subject changes |date = 12 March 2025 |update = Permanent Deadman: World 345 Improvements |change = The Smithing experience gained for creating the first Emberlight on an account was increased from 73 to 730. }} {{Subject changes |date = 26 February 2025 |update = Game Jam: POH Improvements |type = hotfix |change = The Smithing experience gained for creating Emberlights was decreased from 730 to 73. }} {{Subject changes |date = 26 February 2025 |update = Game Jam: POH Improvements |change = Emberlight's creation process can now be reversed, returning only the tormented synapse back. }} {{Subject changes |date = 25 September 2024 |update = Varlamore: The Rising Darkness is OUT NOW |change = The item's model was rotated to match the rest of the demonbane swords. }} {{Subject changes |date = 7 August 2024 |update = Poll 82 Changes |change = Emberlight now correctly cuts through the damage reduction effect of [[Skotizo]]'s [[Awakened Altar|altars]]. }} {{Subject changes |date = 24 July 2024 |update = Deadman: Armageddon & While Guthix Sleeps Tweaks |change = * The item's model has been adjusted slightly. * Emberlight can now be used in place of [[Arclight]] for a [[Clue scroll (master)|master clue]] step. * Players can now forge the emberlight no matter which items they combine first. }} {{Subject changes |date = 17 July 2024 |update = Deadman: Armageddon & While Guthix Sleeps Updates |change = The item's [[value]] has been increased from 1 to 800,000. }} {{Subject changes footer}} ===Gallery (historical)=== {|style="text-align: center" cellpadding="15" |[[File:Emberlight v1.png|center]] |[[File:Emberlight v2.png|center]] |[[File:Emberlight.png|center]] |- |10 July 2024 –

present |} ==Trivia== * The Emberlight was initially proposed as "Firelight", but was renamed sometime during development. ==References== {{reflist}} {{Tormented Demons}} {{Slash weapons}}{{Attribute_affinities}} [[Category:Weapons with Special attacks]] [[Category:Defence reduction]]
